file_name: Abdollahimajd et al. - 2025 - Using the power of artificial intelligence to improve the diagnosis and management of nonmelanoma sk.json

did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review article summarizing existing literature on the use of AI in nonmelanoma skin cancer diagnosis and management. It does not present original research where the authors used AI/ML/DL to obtain new study results; rather, it discusses and cites other studies that utilized methods such as deep learning (DL), convolutional neural networks (CNNs), and artificial neural networks (ANN) for tasks like classification, segmentation, and risk prediction.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
